title: Contract C06: Assets → Timeline
description: Governs the assembly of production assets (approved images, approved narration recordings, licensed music, SFX) into timeline.json. Defines what asset states are required before edit assembly begins, what timeline tracks must contain, and how the timeline is validated before rendering.

upstream_documents.required_state: All HIGH priority images must have approval_status in ['approved', 'pending_production']

upstream_documents.notes: Subtitle is generated after narration recording is done and timecodes are available.

input.description: States that must be satisfied before timeline assembly begins.

required_asset_states.action: Must be replaced or removed before assembly. A rejected image blocks assembly of its associated scene clip.

required_asset_states.action_if_not_met: Halt assembly. Do not assemble timeline without approved narration.

required_asset_states.required: At least one music audio_clip entry in tracks.music

preconditions: image_plan: no images with approval_status = 'rejected' in HIGH priority
Human Review Gate decision = GO or GO_WITH_FIXES (fixes resolved)

output.description: What timeline.json must contain when assembly is complete.

required_tracks.constraint: Total video coverage must equal total_duration_seconds (no gaps, no overlaps beyond dissolve overlap)
required_tracks.purpose: Every second of video must have a visual source.

required_tracks.constraint: All approved voice_lines with line_type=narration must map to an AUD[0-9]{3} clip with line_id_ref
required_tracks.purpose: All recorded narration must be placed in the timeline.

required_tracks.constraint: Music must cover full video duration (fade in/out allowed). No silence gaps in music track unless intentional SFX cue.
required_tracks.purpose: Continuous music underlies the entire documentary.

optional_tracks.purpose: Sound effects for Ma beat ambience, transition cues, or scene-specific audio.
Title cards, year stamps, source credits, lower thirds.
Subtitle file reference for upload to YouTube.

chapter_markers.requirement: At least 3 chapter markers required for YouTube chapter feature

timing_constraints.constraint: video_clip.in_point of clip[n+1] must equal video_clip.out_point of clip[n] minus dissolve overlap (if any)
narration clip timing must align with voice_line position in script flow
timing_constraints.purpose: Narration must not precede the scene it describes.

timing_constraints.constraint: Ma beat scene must have no narration clip overlapping its time window
timing_constraints.purpose: The silence of the Ma beat must be preserved in the timeline.

timing_constraints.constraint: audio_clip.volume_db for music track must be ≤ -12 dB when narration is present
timing_constraints.purpose: Music must not overpower narration. Recommend -18 dB under narration.

color_grade.purpose: All video clips must have color_grade set for visual consistency. Must be set before rendering.

render_settings.purpose: Render settings must be explicit before rendering begins.

assembly_status_progression: pending → in_progress → draft_complete → review_pending → approved → rendered

checks.description: Total video coverage equals total_duration_seconds (no gaps)
checks.action_on_fail: Identify gap. Extend adjacent clip or add filler clip with same source.
Extend or loop music clip to cover gap.

checks.description: All narration clips have valid line_id_ref
checks.action_on_fail: Tag missing line_id_ref. Cross-reference with voice.json.

checks.description: Music volume during narration sections ≤ -12 dB
checks.action_on_fail: Apply volume automation or lower base volume to -18 dB.

checks.description: Ma beat time window has no narration clip
checks.action_on_fail: Remove any narration clip overlapping Ma beat window.
Add or correct first chapter marker.

checks.description: render_settings is populated with at least codec_video, bitrate_video_mbps, container
All HIGH priority images with approval_status != 'approved' are absent from video track
checks.action_on_fail: Replace timeline clip with fallback_image_id reference.

checks.description: At least one subtitle track is present in tracks.subtitle

failure_conditions.human_action: Complete recording, review takes, approve final narration before assembling timeline.

failure_conditions.condition: HIGH priority image has no approved version and no fallback
failure_conditions.human_action: Resolve image: approve AI generation, find stock alternative, or create motion graphic.

failure_conditions.condition: Timeline has narration in Ma beat window
failure_conditions.human_action: Remove narration clip from Ma beat time window.
License and add music track. Minimum: one royalty-free track for full duration.

recovery_strategy.scenario: Rejected AI image blocks scene assembly
recovery_strategy.strategy: Check image_plan.fallback_image_id for the rejected image. Use fallback as clip source. If no fallback: (1) try stock search for same visual concept; (2) if no stock: create MOTION_GRAPHICS placeholder; (3) update image_plan entry to reflect actual source used.
Trim narration clip to end before Ma beat in_point. If narration text is too long, confirm with voice director whether to cut take or re-record shortened take.
Identify scene that should cover the gap. If scene clip is missing: pull from image_plan. If image is not yet generated: use nearest approved image with a slow zoom applied.

recovery_strategy.scenario: Music track ends before video ends
recovery_strategy.strategy: Loop final 30 seconds of music track with 3-second crossfade. Fade to silence for final 5 seconds of video.
